title: Profit First
subtitle: Transform Your Business from a Cash-Eating Monster to a Money-Making Machine
author: Mike Michalowicz
themes: Inverting the GAAP formula to prioritize profit
Behavioral psychology as a tool for financial discipline
Small frequent distributions over big annual surprises
Parkinson's Law applied to business spending
The PLACE allocation system (Profit, Owners Comp, Tax, OpEx)
Envelope-style banking for business cash management
awards: Over 600,000 small businesses have implemented the system
excerpt: Sales minus Expenses equals Profit is a lie. The truth: Sales minus Profit equals Expenses. Take your profit first — then run your business on what remains. This single inversion transforms a cash-eating monster into a money-making machine.
